H1.name: Coupling strength > 0.50
H1.details: All sector pairs exceed 0.50 at all depths

H2.name: Coupling retention > 0.70
H2.details: Projection-antisymmetry maintains > 0.70 through depth 20; projection-neutral through depth 16; antisymmetry-neutral fails at depth 16

H3.name: Coupling drift < 0.30
H3.details: All sector pairs remain below 0.30 threshold across all depths; maximum drift 0.2056 at antisymmetry-neutral depth 20

H4.name: RG stability > 0.90
H4.details: RG similarity peaks at 0.9656 (projection-antisymmetry, depth 1); never exceeds 0.90 beyond depth 3; falls to 0.8389 at antisymmetry-neutral depth 20

H5.name: All sector pairs nonzero recursive retention
H5.details: All sector pairs maintain nonzero coupling strength across all depths
